content.text: OpenShift blockers from the spike stay closed — MPI TrainJobs run under default restricted SCC (no anyuid, no
not required (native MPI backend); MPI needs
for inter-node SSH; today it’s missing on published bases (e.g. cuda-13.0-el9.6) so training layers add it manually — platform fix tracked as
In Testing (blocked on validation / release plumbing):
PR line items: adjust to whatever is actually merged vs in review today (Jira won’t show GitHub state).
